name: quick_map
description: Generate a compact tree view of project structure with file sizes and extension stats.

parameters.name: --filter=GLOBS
parameters.description: Show only files matching comma-separated globs

examples.expected: Shows project tree for src/ with depth 3 filtered to .go and .md files

cost_saving_rationale: Collapses multiple ls/find/tree calls into a single project overview step.
